title: Oyuki the Virgin
writer: Matsutarô Kawaguchi, Tatsunosuke Takashima, Guy de Maupassant
actors: Isuzu Yamada, Komako Hara, Daijirô Natsukawa
plot: During a war in the 19th century, a village linked to rebellious forces is attacked by the government army, so a rich family decides to run away; two courtesans travel along them.
